status.forbiddenDescription: This profile cannot be viewed publicly.
status.loadingTitle: Profile can't be loaded right now
status.loadingDescription: Please try again in a moment.

social.actionError: Follow action could not be completed.

feed.title: Community feed
feed.description: This area is reserved for the user's posts and community contributions.

community.title: Connect with the community
community.description: Nearby people and local participation opportunities.
community.localGuidesDescription: Discover guide members contributing to the neighborhood.
community.activePeopleDescription: Members who have been posting regularly lately.
community.activePeopleMeta: 14 active members in the last 7 days

blocked.title: Blocked users
blocked.description: People you block cannot interact with your profile until you unblock them.
blocked.loadError: Blocked users could not be loaded.

onboarding.title: Profile completion
onboarding.description: You can complete the steps below whenever you like.
onboarding.bonusDescription: Cover photo upload will be added soon.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.missingHint: Add a profile photo to make your account more recognizable.

bio.title: Bio
bio.missingHint: Introduce yourself in a few sentences.

company.title: Company / organization
company.doneHint: Company or organization information has been filled in.
company.missingHint: Add the company or organization you are connected to.

location.title: Location
location.missingHint: Add a location so people know where you are.

occupation.title: Occupation
occupation.doneHint: Occupation information has been filled in.
occupation.missingHint: Add what you do or what you specialize in.

website.title: Website
website.missingHint: Add your personal site or portfolio link.

settings.loginRequiredDescription: Sign in to edit your profile settings.
settings.preparingDescription: Your profile record is being created. Please try again in a moment.
settings.accessRestrictedDescription: You do not have permission to view these profile settings.
settings.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find your profile. Please try again later.
settings.serviceUnavailableDescription: Profile settings can't be loaded right now. Please try again later.
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: These fields are optional. Update them whenever it makes sense.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: JPG, PNG or WebP. Up to 5 MB.
avatar.hint: When you upload a new avatar, it is uploaded to R2 first, then attached to your profile.
avatar.fileDefault: You can upload only JPG, PNG or WebP.
avatar.fileTooLarge: The file size can be at most 5 MB.
avatar.uploadStartError: Avatar upload could not be started.
avatar.uploadFormatError: Avatar upload response was not in the expected format.
avatar.uploadFailed: The image file could not be uploaded. Please try again.
avatar.attachFailed: Avatar could not be attached to the profile.
avatar.profileUnreadable: Avatar was updated, but the profile data could not be read.
avatar.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during avatar upload.

coverPhoto.title: Cover photo
coverPhoto.description: JPG, PNG or WebP. Up to 10 MB.
coverPhoto.hint: Use a wide image for the best profile header result.
coverPhoto.fileDefault: You can upload only JPG, PNG or WebP.
coverPhoto.fileTooLarge: The file size can be at most 10 MB.
coverPhoto.uploadStartError: Cover photo upload could not be started.
coverPhoto.uploadFormatError: Cover photo upload response was not in the expected format.
coverPhoto.uploadFailed: The image file could not be uploaded. Please try again.
coverPhoto.attachFailed: Cover photo could not be attached to the profile.
coverPhoto.profileUnreadable: Cover photo was updated, but the profile data could not be read.
coverPhoto.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during cover photo upload.

alert.coverPhotoErrorTitle: Cover photo could not be updated
alert.successMessage: Your profile information has been updated.
alert.unauthorizedMessage: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
alert.forbiddenMessage: You don't have permission to do that.
alert.upstreamMessage: Profile service unavailable. Please try again.

fields.websiteHint: Enter a URL starting with http:// or https://.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.description: Choose which in-app notifications you want to receive.
notifications.loadError: Notification preferences could not be loaded.

followRequest.label: Follow requests
followRequest.description: When someone asks to follow your private profile.

followRequestAccepted.label: Accepted follow requests
followRequestAccepted.description: When your follow request is accepted.

profilePost.label: Profile bell posts
profilePost.description: When a profile you subscribed to shares a post.

cityPost.label: City posts
cityPost.description: When a post is shared for your city.

followedFirstPost.label: First posts from people you follow
followedFirstPost.description: When someone you follow shares their first post.

postLike.label: Post likes
postLike.description: When your post receives a like.

commentLike.label: Comment likes
commentLike.description: When your comment receives a like.

postComment.label: Post comments
postComment.description: When someone comments on your post.

commentReply.label: Comment replies
commentReply.description: When someone replies to your comment.

generic.label: Other notifications
generic.description: Other relevant account or community updates.

empty.typeHint: Type a user, community or post.

errors.loadFailed: Discovery hub could not be loaded.

feed.emptyDescription: Be the first to share with the community.
feed.noCityResults: Sorry, no posts were found for the city you're looking for. You can keep browsing posts from other cities below.

post.maxImagesError: You can select up to 8 images.
post.mediaOptimizingNotice: Images over 1 MB can be optimized automatically by backend.

comment.title: Comments
comment.hint: Leave your thoughts on this post.

notifications.title: Notifications
